name: Redline — Product Management
description: Canonical visual workspace for Redline product management. Owns all relational and spatial product artifacts: roadmaps, opportunity solution trees, user story maps, dependency graphs, sprint tracking, and prioritisation matrices. Markdown docs are canonical for narrative artifacts (PRDs, decisions); this board is canonical for spatial ones.
frames: Feature D: Pre-Review Engine — story map, D1-D6 slices, dependency graph, sprint table
Sprint Tracking — live sprint status table
Roadmap — opportunity solution tree, H2 2026 horizon view
MoSCoW Register — current feature prioritisation matrix

name: Redline — Marketing
description: Canonical visual workspace for Redline marketing artifacts. Owns all relational and spatial marketing artifacts: Content Segmentation Grid, campaign maps, Dream 100 target list, editorial calendar visual, and persona maps. Markdown docs are canonical for written artifacts (content briefs, signal reports); this board is canonical for spatial ones.
frames: Content Segmentation Grid — content x persona x buying-cycle stage matrix
Editorial Calendar — 90-day visual calendar with Graeme sign-off flags
Dream 100 — target list with commenting intelligence
Personas — Day-1 ICP and LinkedIn audience maps
